text.tspan: The probability of receiving the reward is the same

for Option B. Therefore, the expected value of the
reward is higher for Option B, making it the more
The reason I choose Option A is because even though
Option B offers a higher reward, it comes with as
significantly higher effort requirement. The 88% probability

The probability of receiving the reward is the same for both
options, but the potential reward is greater for Option B.
Therefore, the expected value of the reward is higher for
Option B, making it the more attractive choice.
The reason I choose Option A is because even though Option B
offers a higher reward, it comes with as significantly higher effort
requirement. The 88% probability of receiving the reward means
that there is still a 12% chance of receiving nothing.
